rationale: Active war remains the overwhelming reality for Ukrainian residents; EU accession talks advancing is a mild positive signal but no qualitative change to the war situation.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — active combat continues
top_events.summary: War continues at full intensity with no ceasefire or qualitative change; daily life in Ukraine remains defined by conflict, air strikes, and mobilization.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: EU formally advancing membership talks is a positive signal for Ukraine's long-term future, though no immediate change to war conditions.

top_events.title: Trump condemns Israel's Beirut attack, says Iran deal still close
top_events.summary: Trump's continued focus on Iran deal is rhetoric only; US attention remains partially diverted from Ukraine support — no confirmed policy change.
